payload.description: Implement plexus.scorecards.search and plexus.score.search in MCP/tools/tactus_runtime/execute.py using rapidfuzz.process.extract + WRatio. Score search ranks scores across scorecards (configurable scorecard_limit). Wire DIRECT_HANDLERS, HELPER_BINDINGS, optional ctor injectors. Unit tests with monkeypatched GraphQL. Update documentation/agent/mcp/read-apis.md and console builtin prompt (v1.6.0).
payload.title: Add RapidFuzz scorecard and score search to execute_tactus
